candidate.completion: send a group text so I can get rejected more efficiently.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please send a group text so I can get rejected more efficiently.

evaluation.rationale: Clear reversal in treating rejection as an efficiency problem, with a fresh social detail in "group text," but the ending explains the joke rather than snapping shut, which costs compression, quotability, and grace.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
